summary: Tested Settings page tab nav redesign and new delete endpoints. All 8 features verified: pill/segmented tab nav, icons in tabs, delete students/attendance buttons, confirmation modals (cancel works), backend DELETE endpoints.

test_results.Tab nav pill/segmented style (bg-slate-1: PASS - container found, active tab has bg-white
test_results.Each tab has icon alongside label: PASS - SVG icons confirmed in tab buttons, 8 tabs total
test_results.Delete Students modal opens, Cancel dism: PASS - modal opened, mentions Student, dismissed on Cancel
test_results.Delete Attendance modal opens, Cancel di: PASS - modal opened, mentions Attendance, dismissed on Cancel

seed_data_creation: None - delete endpoints were tested (data was already empty from previous iterations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login: admin@test.local / Admin1234! (click 'Sign in with email & password' first). Settings tab nav is pill-style. Data tab is 8th tab - use exact text match 'Data' to avoid clicking 'Student Data'. Delete modals use data-testid='delete-target-confirm-input' for the confirm input.
